reviews.comment:
Cada vez más para atrás el ACA de la Falda. El personal le pone toda la onda. Pero está pésimamente administrado.  NO TIENEN NI SERVICIO DE CAMBIO DE ACEITE PARA EL SOCIO.

(Translated by Google)
The Falda ACA is increasingly backward. The staff is very cool. But it's terribly managed. They don't even offer an oil change service for members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXdzhTS1lREAE

reviews.comment:
Los empleados se dirigen con respeto al cliente. Bien vestidos y afeitados. Si el parabrisas está sucio lo limpian. Eso habla de la seriedad.

(Translated by Google)
The employees treat customers with respect. They're well-dressed and clean-shaven. If the windshield is dirty, they clean it. That speaks to their professionalism.
